ProjectList.ProjectSummary: A Python-based system for managing attendance, student records, and schedules using modular programming and file handling concepts.
DetailPointList: Manages attendance and student information in one system.
Uses modular programming to keep features organized.
Applies file handling for data storage and retrieval.

ProjectList.ProjectSummary: A Java object-oriented application that manages patient records, appointments, and billing in a simulated healthcare environment.
DetailPointList: Covers patient records, appointments, and billing flow.
Strengthens system design and application logic skills.

ProjectList.ProjectSummary: A C programming project that simulates booking, cancellation, and reporting within a reservation workflow.
DetailPointList: Strengthens problem solving with process-based design.
